mdRecord.dcterms:title: Banjo Dancing by Stephen Wade and Milton Kramer
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for the Aug 10, 1992 Merrywang Inc. production Banjo Dancing or the 48th Annual Squitters Mountain Song, Dance, Folklore Convention & Banjo Contest and How I Lost. Written and collected by Stephen Wade, directed and produced by Milton Kramer.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Banjo
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
